criteria.name: Canonical hourly FFMC in _hffmc_calc
criteria.evidence: tests/test_phase12_wagner_hourly.py fails against the cffdrs reference vectors. In src/pea_met_network/cleaning.py:494, _hffmc_calc still uses daily-style behavior: rain threshold >0.5mm, a special <1.5mm branch, simplified wetting logic, and an upper cap of 101.0. This violates the Phase 12 spec requirement for Van Wagner 1977 hourly FFMC (0.0579 scale factor, all rain >0, separate drying/wetting formulas, no upper cap).

criteria.name: Daily DMC/DC from 14:00 LST observation
criteria.evidence: tests/test_phase12_wagner_hourly.py::TestDailyDMCDC::test_single_day_14lstm fails, showing DMC varies within the same day when it should be constant across all hours for that local date. The issue maps to src/pea_met_network/cleaning.py:815 in _daily_dmc_dc_calc.

criteria.name: Legacy function retained only for comparison
criteria.evidence: tests/test_phase12_wagner_hourly.py::TestCalculateFWIHourly::test_legacy_produces_different_ffmc fails with max diff 0.0000, meaning calculate_fwi_hourly and _calculate_fwi_legacy currently produce identical FFMC output. That indicates the new hourly path is not meaningfully different from the legacy implementation; see src/pea_met_network/cleaning.py:729 and :870.

failing_nodes.message: _hffmc_calc does not implement the Phase 12 canonical hourly FFMC algorithm: it ignores sub-0.5mm rain, retains a daily-style rain branch, caps FFMC at 101, and does not match cffdrs reference vectors.
_daily_dmc_dc_calc does not keep DMC/DC constant within a local day as required by the Phase 12 spec and failing tests.
calculate_fwi_hourly is not producing FFMC output materially different from _calculate_fwi_legacy, so the new hourly path is not yet replacing the broken legacy behavior.

summary: Lisa review REJECT for Phase 12. Gate results show artifact validation and pre-flight both SKIP for this phase, and Martin lint reports only medium/low findings, so lint is not the blocker. The actual blocker is functional: the required test run (.venv/bin/pytest tests/ -q) fails 9 Phase 12 tests, all centered on the new hourly FWI implementation. The failures show that _hffmc_calc does not match the canonical cffdrs/Van Wagner 1977 hourly FFMC behavior, _daily_dmc_dc_calc does not preserve one DMC/DC value per local day, and calculate_fwi_hourly is still effectively behaving like the legacy path instead of the new hourly implementation.
